title: LACP Tribunal Vote
description: Schema for a vote cast by an agent within a Tribunal consensus process. Updated v2 with personality-weighted fields.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the voting agent.

role.description: The role of the agent. Must be one of the 18 canonical LACP roles or a domain-specific role that maps to a canonical role.

archetype.description: The personality archetype assigned to this agent (AAPS). Includes Formic ant-colony archetypes and domain-specific archetypes from Provenance, TalentOS, Artifex, DVS, and EAC-Vision swarms.

confidence.description: Self-reported confidence score in the verdict.

vote_weight.description: Personality-derived tribunal vote weight (from OCEAN scores). Default 1.0 for unweighted consensus.

reasoning.description: Natural language explanation of the decision.

vector_embedding.description: High-dimensional vector representation of the reasoning for sycophancy detection.

personality_snapshot.description: Optional snapshot of the agent's OCEAN scores at vote time for audit trail.

sycophancy_flag.description: Whether this vote was flagged as potentially sycophantic by the detector.

salt.description: Random salt used during the Commit phase (only present in Reveal phase).
